title: Found&Foraged
description: This mod adds new crops, metals and minerals and many new things. Also this mod remakes some illogical things in minecraft, for example when you break glass it doesn't disappear but cracks and then it can be resmelted.Hope you enjoy playing with this mod.
body: This Minecraft modification expands the game with new materials and options! It adds tin and bronze, allows you to make bronze tools, and introduces more logical loot such as animals dropping bones and leather. It also introduces new crops such as strawberries, peas, blueberries, tomatoes and cucumbers. Hammers that can be used for crushing blocks but also as a weapon, new glass slabs. Rats, mice and squid meat. And that's just the beginning! Many future updates will add even more content and exciting new features!
